text: Entry for desludging. Purge started 06:10, entry 08:25. Gas test 07:55: O2 20.8%, H2S 2 ppm, LEL 0%. See NM-2019-07.
Entry for sludge raking ahead of coating survey. Purge 05:40-08:30. Gas test 08:35 passed. See NM-2022-31.
Grinding at mixer flange platform. Gas test 06:50 (work started 10:05). See INC-2020-03.

SCHEDULED: Confined space entry into TK-401 equalization tank planned for 2026-07-09 08:00 for internal coating inspection and sludge removal. Isolation per SOP-ET-005; P-107 LOTO. Eductor purge planned 06:00-08:00 (2 h) to meet the inspection contractor window. Gas test scheduled 07:45. Authorized by: M. Pillai.
